strongest_forecasting_dataset_matrix.why: Per-request measured actual_ttft_s + scheduler state at decision time (76k rows in 80 MiB head).
Per-request actual_tpot_s + EMA decode iter latency in same row as scheduler state.
Nested schedule_state.* with running_requests[] + waiting_requests[] lists (38k rows).
Per-request actual_e2e_latency_s at 76k rows + per-(instance_type) 9x p99 spread.
5 instance_type subgroups in CARA + 14 GPU configurations in AgentPerfBench (priors).

strongest_forecasting_dataset_matrix.best_dataset: Azure LLM 2024 (arrivals) — replica labels missing everywhere in HF corpus
strongest_forecasting_dataset_matrix.why: Arrival forecasting feasible from Azure; replica-count labels block the end-to-end loop (pilot data required).
Eviction rate is the closest signal; real cold-start labels require pilot data.

strongest_forecasting_dataset_matrix.best_dataset: CARA train_flat (num_preempted proxy) + SwissAI status=ERROR proxy
strongest_forecasting_dataset_matrix.why: No measured SLA budget labels; proxies only.
ISO timestamps from SwissAI (~16M requests) + Unix timestamps from CARA (76k requests in 80 MiB head).
